IServerSession Methods

One Identity Manager API Server

The IServerSession type exposes the following members.

Methods
  NameDescription
ChangeIdAsync
Clear
Clears all data associated with the specified application.
CommitAsync
Commits the changes to the session store.
GetData
Returns a string from the session key-value store.
GetOrAdd
ReloadAsync
Reloads the session state from the database.
SetData
Sets a value in the session's key-value store.
